logs.reasoning: Received input text 'G-10 mein pani bhar gaya hai'. Parsed language (Urdu) and extracted keywords [G-10, pani bhar, flood].
Cross-referenced G-10 coordinates with Met Department rainfall data (45mm/hr). Identified high correlation. Set confidence to 92%.
Determined impact radii. Formulated plan: Dispatch 2 units, Alert users in 2km, Reroute traffic via Kashmir Highway.
Executed traffic simulation. Blocking primary routes in G-10. Calculated alternative paths with minimal congestion impact.
